title: hypericum nummularium
intro: Hypericum nummularium, also known as Creeping St. John's Wort, is a perennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the St. John's Wort family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, antiviral, and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be attributed to its high concentration of hyperforin and hypericin. The health benefits of Creeping St. John's Wort include its potential to reduce anxiety, improve mood, and alleviate symptoms of depression, as well as its ability to treat wounds, reduce inflammation, and promote skin health. Creeping St. John's Wort can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or ointment, and is often used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds, and internally to support mental health and well-being.
